metadata.name: Popsical Music Recommendation Links
metadata.description: Starter mood-based playlist dataset for the Popsical classical music chatbot. Links are placeholders and should be replaced with real Spotify playlist and YouTube mix URLs.
metadata.intended_use: Tooling/retrieval layer for recommending classical music by user mood or listening intent.

bedtime.description: Soft, gentle classical music for winding down, bedtime routines, naps, and quiet evenings.

recommendations.title: Popsical Bedtime Classical Playlist
recommendations.suggested_for: Parents looking for calm music before sleep or nap time.

exciting.description: Bold and energetic classical music for movement, excitement, big feelings, and dramatic listening moments.

recommendations.title: Popsical Exciting Classical Playlist
recommendations.suggested_for: Kids who want music that feels adventurous, fast, or dramatic.
sample_pieces: Grieg - In the Hall of the Mountain King

magical.description: Dreamy, sparkling classical music that feels imaginative, fairy-tale-like, and full of wonder.

recommendations.title: Popsical Magical Classical Playlist
recommendations.suggested_for: Families looking for music with a fairy-tale, fantasy, or storybook feeling.
sample_pieces: Tchaikovsky - Dance of the Sugar Plum Fairy

calm.description: Peaceful classical music for quiet play, focused activities, morning routines, or mellow family time.

recommendations.title: Popsical Calm Classical Playlist
recommendations.suggested_for: Quiet play, drawing, reading, or peaceful background listening.
sample_pieces: Bach - Air on the G String
Dvořák - Songs My Mother Taught Me

fun.description: Playful classical music for dancing, moving, laughing, and introducing kids to classical music in a joyful way.

recommendations.title: Popsical Fun Classical Playlist
recommendations.suggested_for: Families who want upbeat, kid-friendly classical music for playtime.

fallback.description: Use when the user asks for music but does not specify a clear mood.

recommendations.title: Popsical Starter Classical Playlist
recommendations.suggested_for: A first classical playlist for families and young children.
